app.title: Deckbound
app.tagline: Choose your path through the endless deck
app.loadFailHint: Please serve the game over HTTP (e.g. npx http-server). Opening index.html directly cannot load config files.

howto.title: 📜 How to Play
howto.body:
World　The world is an endless deck of cards. You don't draw cards — you walk on them. Reach the Throne of Fate on floor 50 to win.

Vision　You only ever see two rows: in the first row (near) the middle 5 cards are visible and clickable; in the second row (far) only the 3 cards ahead are revealed, for observation only.

Movement　Click a card in the first row to move: the 3 cards ahead are free; farther cards cost 1 energy per extra step. Every 3 floors of travel drains 1 energy. Keyboard: ←→↑ (or A/D/W).

Energy　Recover energy by resting, and via cards like springs, camps, food and shrines.

Rest　Rest restores 1 energy; the cards in both visible rows shift positions randomly — including unrevealed backs. Shortcut: R.

Power　Power is an independent stat, not derived from HP and ATK. Clicking a monster starts an instant auto-battle: higher power wins. Victory grants power and gold; defeat costs HP and knocks you back.

Gear　Picking up gear never overwrites what you wear: choose to equip it, bag it, or sell it; swap bagged gear anytime with a tap.

Rarity　The colored dot at a card's bottom-right shows its rarity: blue=Rare　purple=Epic　orange=Legendary　red=Mythic (Common shows no dot). Higher rarity means stronger gear.

The deck drifts　The world is alive: monsters wander, merchants leave, chests get looted by other adventurers, fire spreads, curses creep.

Death　Death loses everything, but meta progress remains: best floor, boss kills, unlocked classes.

prologue.title: Prologue · The World Became Cards
prologue.text:
No one remembers what happened that night.

When they woke, the land, the towns, the mountains and seas were gone — replaced by a vast array of cards stretching endlessly northward. Every card is a road, an enemy, a choice.

The last prophecy of the diviners: "Go north. Through mist, bone, flame and mirror — upon the fiftieth card sits the Throne of Fate that can rewrite it all."

Countless adventurers set out. None returned.

Now it is your turn.

class.pickHint: Fate deals you five cards — pick one to begin

steps.player: This is you. You stand on the bottom row and can only advance one floor per turn.
steps.near: The first row (near). The middle 5 cards are visible — the 3 ahead are free to enter; the outer two cost 1 energy per extra step.
steps.far: The second row (far). Only the 3 cards ahead are revealed. You can't click them, but you can plan your route.
steps.energy: Energy. Long sidesteps and long journeys (every 3 floors) drain it. Recover via rest, springs, camps and food.
steps.power: Power. It only grows by defeating enemies. Clicking a monster starts an instant auto-battle — higher power wins.
steps.rest: Low on energy? Rest: +1 energy, and the cards in sight shift positions — even unrevealed backs.
steps.quest: Your goal. Cross the chapters and reach the Throne of Fate on floor 50 to rewrite this world. Good luck.

quest.goalReach: Goal: reach floor {n} and defeat the warden (now floor {cur})
quest.goalFinal: Final battle: floor {n} · Throne of Fate (now floor {cur})
quest.goalEndless: Endless mode · floor {cur} — the deeper you go, the louder the legend

toast.runStart: 🂠 The {cls} steps onto the deck. North, to floor 50.
toast.tooFar: 🌫️ Too far to see that card… move sideways first
toast.noEnergy: ⚡ Not enough energy (need {n}) — take a rest
toast.fatigue: ⚡ The long journey drains you: energy -{n}
toast.drift: 🌊 The deck shifts in the dark…
toast.rest: 🏕️ You rest: energy +{n}. The cards quietly shifted positions
toast.bossAhead: ⚠️ A roar from afar… the warden is ahead!
toast.swapWeapon: 🗡️ Swapped to {name}, old weapon sold for {n} gold
toast.swapArmor: 🛡️ Swapped to {name}, old armor sold for {n} gold
toast.eatFoodFull: 🍖 Bag full — ate {name} on the spot (HP +{hp}, energy +{energy})
toast.keyFull: 🗝️ Bag full — the key stays behind…
toast.cursed: 💀 You are cursed! Power -2 (removable at shops)
toast.doorOpen: 🚪 The key opens the hidden door! Gold +{gold}, power +2
toast.doorLocked: 🚪 The door is locked — no key, only a peek through the crack…
toast.teleport: 🌀 The portal pushes you one floor ahead!
toast.keepKey: 🗝️ Keep the key for hidden doors

gear.title: Found {name}
gear.oldSold: Bag full — {name} will be sold (+{n} gold)

shop.title: 🧙 Wandering Merchant
shop.greeting: "Have a look, traveler. There is no other shop in the deck."　Your gold:
shop.fullEaten: Bag full — ate it on the spot

inv.title: 🎒 Bag
inv.hint: Click an item to use it

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.seed:
World seed: {seed}
The same seed generates the same deck (reserved for daily challenges)
settings.restartSub: Current run will be lost (meta progress remains)

over.deathText: Death is a new beginning. The deck has been reshuffled; fate awaits the next challenger.
over.winText: You sit upon the Throne of Fate. The deck folds beneath you, and the world returns to what it was — at least until the next shuffle.

chapter.finaleEnd: 👑 End the run, take the crown
